notes: The monolix2rx conversion article exposes the final Monolix fixed effects for the bundled theophylline project on the log scale.
The natural-scale parameters below are exp() of the reported Monolix fixed effects.
The Monolix theophylline project dose is encoded in mg/kg, so openpkpd must normalize AMT by WT before comparison.
dataset_citation: Boeckmann AJ, Sheiner LB, Beal SL (1992). NONMEM Users Guide — Part V: Introductory Guide. University of California, San Francisco. [Theophylline dataset: 12 subjects, single oral dose, 132 observations.]
